Industry/sector code with INITCAP normalization for consistent capitalization.

tables.reasoning:
Global mapping strategy: Five source tables map one-to-one with five target Salesforce/custom objects. All natural keys from source are preserved in Legacy_*__c columns for traceability. Account is the central entity; Contact, Opportunity, Project__c, and Installed_Asset__c all join back to Account via TRIM'd source customer number columns (kunde, kd_nr, kd, kd_ref) matching Account.Id. No prefix transformation needed on raw keys - direct TRIM match expected. Enum mappings use case-insensitive matching with explicit German-to-English translations where applicable; unmatched values default to NULL per global policy. Dates parsed via regex-based TO_DATE with multiple format support (DD.MM.YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD, MM/DD/YYYY), preferring NULL over sentinel dates. Amounts normalized by stripping currency symbols and handling European formatting (dot as thousand separator, comma as decimal). CreatedDate/LastModifiedDate/IsDeleted columns require placeholder logic since source lacks audit timestamps - default to CURRENT_TIMESTAMP or '2024-01-01' with IsDeleted=0.
The model directly maps the `kunden` source table to the `Account` target schema, preserving the natural key in both `Id` and `Legacy_Customer_ID__c`. German categorical values for tiers are normalized to the specified English enum domain with a Bronze fallback. Missing audit columns receive safe placeholder dates, and website URLs are prefixed where protocols are absent. All mixed-case target columns use double-quoted aliases to satisfy PostgreSQL identifier casing rules.

column_notes.explanation: Source natural key for contact record, trimmed of whitespace
German first name field, trimmed to remove extra spaces
German last name field with NULLIF handling and 'Unknown' fallback for empty strings (NOT NULL constraint)
Contact email address lowercased and trimmed for consistency
German phone number field, trimmed of whitespace
Job position/title with INITCAP normalization (e.g., 'manager' → 'Manager')
German role/function mapped to English enum: Entscheider→Decision Maker, Endanwender→End User, Techniker→Technical Contact, Geschäftsführer→Executive Sponsor. NULL fallback for unmatched values.
Language preference mapped from German/ISO codes to standard abbreviations: deutsch/deu→DE, englisch/eng→EN, französisch/fra→FR, spanisch/esp→ES, italienisch/ita→IT. NULL for unmatched.
Foreign key to Account via LEFT JOIN on TRIM(kunde) = TRIM(kunden_nr). Handles orphaned contacts with NULL AccountId when no matching account exists.
Source contact ID preserved for audit traceability, matches Id column value
Placeholder date since source lacks creation timestamps. Set to '2024-01-01' as default.
Placeholder date since source lacks modification timestamps. Set to '2024-01-01' as default (same as CreatedDate).
Static constant 0 indicating no records are soft-deleted in source data

column_notes.explanation: TRIMmed source chance_id mapped to Salesforce Opportunity Id. This is the primary key for the Opportunity object.
TRIMmed source bezeichnung (opportunity name) with fallback to 'Unnamed Opportunity' if empty or null, satisfying NOT NULL constraint.
Case-insensitive mapping of German sales phases to standard Salesforce opportunity stage values. Unmatched values default to NULL per enum policy.
Parsed from multiple date formats (DD.MM.YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD, MM/DD/YYYY) via nested TO_DATE calls. Defaults to '2025-12-31' if all parse attempts fail to satisfy NOT NULL constraint.
European number formatting handled: EUR prefix stripped, dot thousand-separators removed, comma-to-period decimal conversion, then cast to DOUBLE PRECISION. NULL for missing values.
Normalized to uppercase ISO 3-letter code with default 'EUR' for unknown or empty currency codes.
LEFT JOIN from source kd_nr (TRIMmed) to Account.Id via Legacy_Customer_ID__c, linking Opportunity to its parent Salesforce Account.
Original source natural key preserved for traceability and row-level verification.

Direct mapping with TRIM to remove whitespace; source is already text type

Enum-mapped German status values (aktiv->Active, abgeschlossen->Completed, in planung->In Planning, angehalten/Gesperrt->On Hold, storniert->Cancelled) to English enum domain; unmatched values default to NULL
Parsed dates from DD.MM.YYYY format (German locale) and YYYY-MM-DD using TO_DATE/SUBSTRING regex guards; invalid or missing dates return NULL instead of sentinels
Generated SF-style Account Id using 0A0 prefix + MD5 hash of trimmed customer number (kd), consistent with how Account.Id is produced, to enable cross-object relationship linking
